name: compete
description: Competitive research, differentiation analysis, and strategic positioning. Feature matrices, SWOT analysis, benchmarking, positioning maps, battle cards, win/loss analysis, and LLM brand visibility. Research only — does not write code.

capabilities.summary: Discovery, profiling, tiering of direct/indirect competitors and substitutes
Feature matrices, pricing comparison, UX benchmarks, tech-stack analysis, SEO comparison
SWOT, positioning maps, benchmarking, differentiation strategy
Alert triage, battle cards, response planning, competitive moves tracking
Deal analysis tied to product, sales, or market strategy
Moat evaluation, category design, PLG competition, pricing posture, DX advantage
LLM brand presence monitoring, AI share of voice, GEO metrics analysis
Prediction validation, source confidence tracking, intelligence quality improvement

recipes.label: Competitor Matrix
recipes.when: Competitor map, feature comparison matrix, tiering

recipes.label: Battle Card
recipes.when: Battle card creation, competitive alert response plan

recipes.label: Positioning Map
recipes.when: Positioning map, category design, moat evaluation

recipes.label: LLM Visibility
recipes.when: LLM brand presence analysis, AI share of voice measurement

recipes.label: Battle Card
recipes.when: One-pager sales-enablement design, objection handling pairs, freshness governance, GTM distribution

recipes.label: Win/Loss Analysis
recipes.when: Post-decision interviews, segmentation, theme extraction, cadence design, CRM integration

recipes.label: Moat (7 Powers)
recipes.when: Helmer 7 Powers assessment, durability scoring, anti-moat detection, statics vs dynamics
